---
name: Question
about: Ask a substantive question about the project — its design, its scope, its operational assumptions.
title: "[question] "
labels: ["question"]
---

## Your question

<!--
What would you like to know?
Be as specific as you can. Substantive questions are welcome and often
help us identify gaps or ambiguities in the documentation.
-->

## What you have already read

<!--
Which documents have you consulted? This helps us avoid pointing you to
material you have already seen, and helps us understand whether the gap
is in the documentation itself.
For example:
- BLUEPRINT.md § 3
- NOMENCLATURE.md
- The README.md
-->

## Your context (optional)

<!--
If relevant, a short description of your context. For example:
researcher in adjacent field, humanitarian operator, engineer evaluating
the architecture, student. This helps us calibrate the answer.
You are not required to share this.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
Any other detail that would help us answer accurately.
-->
